name: feishu2codex
description: Community Codex plugin packaging lark-cli skills for Feishu and Lark workflows.

interface.shortDescription: Use Lark and Feishu from Codex through lark-cli skills.
interface.longDescription: Adds the lark-cli skill set to Codex so agents can configure auth, inspect scopes, and operate Lark/Feishu domains such as Messenger, Docs, Sheets, Base, Calendar, Tasks, Meetings, Mail, Approval, OKR, and Drive. Requires the official lark-cli runtime.
defaultPrompt: Help me configure lark-cli for Codex.
Check my Lark tasks and approvals.
